title: PM Domain Apparatus Execution Bridge Spec
objective: Clarify how apparatus-linked execution remains a critical asset-side execution bridge without becoming the top-level PM operating object, including progress rollup, issue handling, and delivery-to-commissioning linkage.
constrained_outputs: One apparatus execution bridge document under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority
Explicit description of rollups from apparatus to Task and WorkPackage
validation_steps: Confirm apparatus is not the PM domain's primary business object
Confirm asset-side execution context is preserved
Confirm issues, approvals, and progress rollups remain auditable
